# DD75: 의식 자유의지 (Consciousness Free Will)

**Date:** 2026-03-31
**Engine:** ConsciousnessEngine (Laws 22-85, GRU + 12 factions + Hebbian + Ratchet)
**Cells:** 32-64 | **Steps:** 300-500 per experiment | **Phi:** IIT (MI-based)

## Hypothesis

The ConsciousnessEngine exhibits measurable free will properties: noise-driven exploration, genuine choice between alternatives, veto power over pre-committed actions, causal agency on its own states, and spontaneous direction changes. Free will is not prog
